title: ranunculus trichophyllus subsp. lutulentus
intro: Ranunculus trichophyllus subsp. lutulentus, also known as the small-flowered ranunculus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family, Ranunculaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ranunculus trichophyllus subsp. lutulentus include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the body, as well as its ability to treat conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although it's essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedy.
